---
applyTo: "tests/**/*.cs"
---

# Tests — Scoped Instructions

When editing test code, follow the canonical standard:

- Testing → [`agent-standards/60-testing.md`](../../agent-standards/60-testing.md)

Key reminders: xUnit, Arrange/Act/Assert, descriptive `Method_Should_When` names, deterministic and
isolated tests, no real clock or network, cover happy/edge/failure paths.
